case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. OLIVIA GARDNER

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, OLIVIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
COURT'S MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,084.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, OLIVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, OLIVIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARDNER, OLIVIA $1,521.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,566.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
